tests.name: test_final_state.py::test_cluster_status_is_active

def test_cluster_status_is_active():
        """PRIMARY: Verify cluster is in an active state (UP or INIT) on GCP."""
        result = subprocess.run(
            ["sky", "status", CLUSTER_NAME],
            capture_output=True, text=True
        )
        assert result.returncode == 0, f"sky status failed: {result.stderr}"
        output = result.stdout
        is_active = any(state in output for state in ["UP", "INIT", "LAUNCHING", "PROVISIONING"])
